title: Full Stack Engineer (Python/React) - Ankara, TR
description: The Mission: TrustLab is building the trust and safety layer that enables AI agents to be deployed responsibly, as well as other scalable AI solutions, at global scale. We develop and deploy advanced autonomous AI systems that monitor, evaluate and observe agents during development and in production. Founded by senior leaders from Google, YouTube, TikTok, and Reddit, TrustLab’s solutions are industry leading and used by global technology brands to support their daily operations. The Impact: You are part of a team that is responsible for some of the most critical components of our AI centric tech stack. You define and deploy key parts of our global platform that evaluates cutting edge customer AI systems at scale. You will contribute to technical decisions and help push the boundaries of what’s possible with state of the art AI tech. The Role We’re looking for a Backend Engineer to design and build high-performance backend systems that support AI-driven workflows and large-scale data processing. You’ll work on distributed services, APIs, and core infrastructure powering mission-critical products. This role requires strong backend fundamentals, production-grade Python experience, and the ability to own features end-to-end. What You’ll Do Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services in Python Architect APIs and microservices with clean, maintainable abstractions Work with large datasets and asynchronous processing pipelines Optimize performance, reliability, and observability Contribute to system design discussions Own features end-to-end and collaborate across teams Write production-quality, testable, secure code Participate in code reviews and uphold a high engineering bar Core Requirements What We’re Looking For 2-5 years of backend engineering experience Strong production experience in Python (FastAPI, Django, Flask, or similar) Experience designing RESTful APIs and service-oriented architectures Solid understanding of databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and query optimization Experience with async processing, queues (SQS, Kafka), or event-driven systems Good understanding of system design, scalability, and performance Bonus points: Experience working with coding agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, or similar) is a strong plus Experience deploying and operating services on AWS (or another major cloud provider) is a strong plus Experience building or integrating AI agent systems (LLM workflows, orchestration frameworks, or evaluation pipelines) is a plus How We Work: Small teams, high ownership, minimal process overhead Async-first collaboration across Ankara and Silicon Valley Engineers are involved in product and technical decisions, not just execution Why Join TrustLab Ankara? Foundry of Experts: Work directly with AI Industry leaders who scaled trust & safety systems at the world’s largest platforms. Competitive Compensation: Annual salary range of $50k–$70k USD, plus meaningful equity in a venture-backed startup. Modern Workspace: Hybrid flexibility with in-person collaboration at our Maidan, Ankara office. Substantial benefits incl. paid supplemental private health insurance, education stipend, meals and more. Annual Paid US Offsite : Opportunity to join the full team at our US headquarters for strategy alignment, deep collaboration, and innovation. Compensation Range: $50K - $70K

title: Senior Backend Engineer (120.000₺ - 200.000₺)
description: BETA.LIMITED 👉 Beta Limited is: the lean startup studio where we build businesses out of digital products from zero to hero. where hacking, is the whole process of design, development, and execution for building a viable system; constitutes the superpower of our work. the squad of both in-house partners and indie hackers. LET'S MAKE A GOOD JOB TOGETHER 🌟 We are looking for a backend engineer to join our development team, which is rapidly transforming the US market with attractively designed re-sale/re-commerce applications. Are you up for taking a role within our brilliant minds and skilled professionals? Do you see yourself influencing the future of reselling tools in one of the market's fastest-growing technology companies? Let's work together to create the best web applications that tens of thousands of online sellers in the United States, Canada, Australia, and Europe enjoy. REQUIRED TECH-STACK 🧰 3+ years of experience as a backend/full-stack engineer working with JavaScript and Node.js. Experience with TypeScript and NestJS is a plus. Ability to create and integrate RESTful API. Experience with Git version control system, including branching and merging strategies. Working experience with AWS services (e.g: EC2, RDS, S3, etc.) Experience with MongoDB. ROLE 💪 Develop backend applications and improve the quality of our system architecture. Refine, and tune integrations between applications. Analyze and resolve technical and application problems. Deploy new releases that work. Bring new technology and ideas to the table. PERKS & BENEFITS 🎁 Become a part of our journey and show the world how your work will make a change. Use the best practices of agile software development under the roof of a product studio. Competitive salary package in USD. Work remotely.

title: Backend Developer
description: Pozisyon Hakkında: Hexagonal mimari, NestJS, TypeScript ve .NET Core teknolojileriyle yazılım projelerimizi geliştiren bir ekibe katılacak, orta seviyede deneyime sahip bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. Ekibimizle birlikte bağımsız microservisler tasarlayıp geliştirecek ve mevcut projelerde aktif rol alacaksınız. Sorumluluklarınız: Hexagonal mimari prensiplerine uygun, ölçeklenebilir microservisler geliştirmek. NestJS ve TypeScript kullanarak yeni modüller geliştirmek ve mevcutları optimize etmek. .NET Core teknolojileriyle backend süreçlerinde destek sağlamak. gRPC tabanlı iletişim çözümleri geliştirmek ve uygulamak. Test odaklı geliştirme (TDD) süreçlerini takip etmek ve test yazmak. Teknik dökümantasyon hazırlamak ve kod kalite standartlarını sağlamak. Aranan Nitelikler: Bilgisayar mühendisliği veya ilgili bir alanda lisans derecesi. NestJS ile en az 4 yıllık deneyim. TypeScript ve .NET Core konularında bilgi ve deneyim. Hexagonal (veya benzer DDD) mimari prensiplerinde deneyim. gRPC tabanlı iletişim protokollerinde bilgi sahibi olmak. API geliştirme ve entegrasyonu konusunda deneyim. İyi seviyede Javascript / Jquery, React.js bilgisine sahip, MSSQL-Postgre SQL ve Veritabanı Tasarımı, T-SQL konularında deneyim. Git ve versiyon kontrol sistemlerinde tecrübe. Clean Code ve SOLID prensiplerine bağlılık. Takım çalışmasına yatkınlık ve problem çözme yeteneği. Tercih Sebebi Olacak Ekstra Yetenekler: Kubernetes, Docker gibi containerization teknolojilerine hakimiyet. Mikroservis mimarisi ve mesajlaşma sistemleri (RabbitMQ, Kafka vb.) deneyimi. Microsoft Dynamics CRM alanında deneyimli olması. Cach yapısı olarak Redis vb sistemlerle çalışmış olmak. Mongo DB’ de daha önce deneyimli olunması. Unit, integration ve end-to-end test yazma tecrübesi. CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi. Size Ne Sunuyoruz? Kendinizi geliştirebileceğiniz ve teknoloji trendlerini yakından takip eden bir çalışma ortamı. Ekip içi bilgi paylaşımı ve sürekli öğrenme fırsatları. İletişim : hr@mgssoftware.net Lokasyon : Trabzon

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: Accenture is a leading global professional services company that helps the world’s leading businesses, governments and other organizations build their digital core, optimize their operations, accelerate revenue growth and enhance citizen services—creating tangible value at speed and scale. We are a talent and innovation-led company serving clients in more than 120 countries. We combine our strength in technology and leadership in cloud, data and AI with unmatched industry experience, functional expertise and global delivery capability. We measure our success by the 360° value we create for our clients, each other, our shareholders, partners and communities. What’s in it for you? ✨ Work-Life Balance: Hybrid working model / Flexible hours / Birthday off / No dress code / Happy Hours 🩺 Health & Wellness: Life & Health Insurance / An Employee Assistance & Wellness Program 🚌 Transportation : Shuttle service / Transportation support 💰 Financial Benefits: Meal allowance / Employee Referral Bonus Program / Performance bonus & promotion / Accenture Recognition Points 💪 Professional Development: Learning budget / Personal career development with People Leads / Buddy Program 🌎 Work Environment : Working on international projects with a globally diverse team / A fast-paced technology environment Required Qualifications: 3+ years of software engineering and hands-on programming experience in web applications Experience in at least one of the major application frameworks like Spring, ASP.NET Web API / Core MVC Experience in one or more general programming languages/frameworks such as Java, C#, Python, Node.JS, or similar Experience in REST services, SOAP Familiarity with one of the cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, GCP Knowledge of relational databases, NoSQL databases, data storage and processing Familiarity with DevOps (Continuous Integration, Continuous Testing and Continuous Delivery) is a plus Phyton knowledge (important nice to have) Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Excellent problem solving skills and a high degree of intellectual horsepower BS or higher degree in Computer Science or related discipline, or equivalent industry experience Key Responsibilities: Build rich client web applications with a focus on performance and user experience Follow, learn and apply new technologies and innovations Pursue opportunities to improve delivery quality and efficiency within the organization Ready to make an impact? If you are excited about working with cutting-edge technology and participating in thrilling international projects, we want to hear from you! Join Accenture and achieve your goals. #GreatPlaceToWork Location : Teknopark Istanbul (Kurtköy) Hybrid: 3 days office per week Apply Now!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Loodos is one of the first established companies in the industry, providing end-to-end mobile solutions since 2004. Who we are: Loodos’s utmost motivation is Mobile Excellence. We build end-to-end solutions with best technical and business approaches. Bringing human behavior understanding and deep technical abilities together carry the mobile application to level of excellence. In our R&D center office we have awesome teammates that we can safely incorporate into our mobile application and infrastructure projects, which have a direct R&D-oriented vision and reach over 25 million monthly active users. Excellence is not only a station to arrive, but also a way of journey! We open our doors to every method and idea that will help our self-development. We are a team that ‘loves their job’, ‘builds strong infrastructures’, ‘high-tech oriented employees’ and ‘always entertained’. If you want to be a part of the beloved culture of Loodos, your place is ready! Would you like to join us? What we’re looking for: 3+ years of experience with deep skills in development Good verbal and written communication skills (in Turkish and English – min B1 level) Solid understanding of the software development life cycle Ability to write testable, clean and high-quality code Familiar with common development and Agile practices Knowledge of multiple languages and frameworks (.NET, Java, JavaScript, Typescript etc.) Experience in front-end web development with some combination of React.js, Vue.js and/or Angular Good knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, nginx, gRPC, RabbitMQ/Kafka, ElasticAPM, Grafana, Ocelot Experience with Redis, ElasticSearch and/or MongoDB Deep understanding of third-party libraries, web services and REST APIs Strong knowledge of design principles, patterns, and best practices Hands-on experience developing production-ready mobile and web applications Experience in tools for effective teamwork such as Git, Issue Tracking, CI/CD Being passionate to use new technologies in projects Ability to quickly learn and unlearn Excellent time management skills with a proven ability to meet deadlines Strong communication, problem solving and critical and analytical thinking skills What you’ll do: We are looking for new teammates who will contribute to building scalable, high-quality web and mobile applications across the full stack. As a Full Stack Developer, you will design and develop both front-end and back-end systems used by millions of users, taking an active role in technical decisions and ensuring sustainable, efficient solutions. You will collaborate closely with product and technical teams, identify architectural challenges early, and take initiative to solve them. By continuously improving existing systems from UI components to backend services and infrastructure and exploring better ways of building digital experiences, you will contribute directly to both development processes and product quality. What’s in it for you? Being a part of a fast growing and R&D focused tech company and working witha young, talented, and dynamic team Great career and personal development opportunities in a project-based working environment Unique opportunity to take responsibility in active local and/or worldwide projects from different industries Within a flat organization structure, open communication in the workplace Flexible working hours, locations (not only during the pandemic) Net salary, meal card, private health insurance for sure Personal training budget ($ 1000 / year) Happy hours, team-bonding events A pleasant, beloved, and activity-filled office To get to know us better, please have a look at our website! https://loodos.com/ We believe in diversity and equal opportunity! All applications will be assessed regardless to age, religion, gender identity, race, nationality, disability, or marital status. Note: We’ll contact only with suitable applicants. Thanks in advance for your understanding!

title: Backend Developer-Banking Applications (Credit,Treasury)
description: Join the Minds Behind the Future of Tech! At Mobven, we are committed to building high-quality digital products that transform industries. Founded in 2012, we evolved from a promising startup into an award-winning technology company, recognized by Deloitte as one of the EMEA region’s fastest-growing tech firms—four years in a row. Our expertise in mobile technology and digital transformation has made us a trusted partner for global enterprises. We are looking for individuals who take pride in their craft, push their work to the highest standards, and thrive in a culture of excellence. If you are someone who values expertise, precision, and innovation and is eager to contribute to groundbreaking digital solutions that shape the future of technology, join us at Mobven. Be part of a team where your skills, dedication, and passion will be recognized, challenged, and elevated to new height Key Responsibilities Design, develop, document, test, and debug new and existing software systems. Engage in the full software development lifecycle, including requirements analysis, design, implementation, testing, and deployment. Develop RESTful APIs using WebAPI frameworks. Required Skills and Experience : 4+ years of experience in .NET development using C#.Hands-on experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases, BOA, PostgreSQL, and ElasticSearch.Proficiency in RabbitMQ and Redis. Experience with BOA and WPF.Experience with source control systems such as TFS, GitHub, or similar tools. Familiarity with unit testing and integration testing methodologies. Knowledge of software engineering best practices for the entire software development lifecycle. Solid understanding of Windows and Linux environments.Knowledge of web services, including RESTful architecture, JSON, SOAP, and XML, and their use in system integration. Strong problem-solving abilities paired with excellent communication and collaboration skills.A strong passion for learning and adopting new technologies. What We O ffer: Health Insurance Mealcard Transport Allowance Training Budget GiftCard BirthdayLeave Happy Hour

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: As a Full Stack Engineer, you will be responsible for developing scalable and secure applications, maintaining clean and efficient code, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end digital aviation solutions. What We’re Looking For Minimum 4 years of professional experience in full stack development Strong proficiency in PHP and MySQL (Raw SQL) Experience with PHP-PDO and secure database interactions Hands-on experience with Git version control systems Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript Proficiency in jQuery and AJAX for dynamic web interactions Familiarity with Slim Framework is a big plus Experience with React is a significant advantage Knowledge of TypeScript is a strong plus Good command of written and spoken English Please note that experience with both PHP and React is mandatory. Only candidates with experience in both PHP and React will be considered; all other applications will not be taken into account." What We Offer The opportunity to build technology that powers global aviation A collaborative and agile working environment Continuous learning and career development Competitive compensation and flexible hybrid work model Ready to take off with us? Apply now and become part of a team revolutionizing aviation technology.

title: Backend Developer
description: We build AI-driven app and web products operating across healthcare, finance, and service industries for global markets. What we look for 4+ years of professional backend development experience Strong experience with Python and Django Solid experience with Django REST Framework and API development Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL, database design, and query optimization Experience managing database migrations, schema changes, and data integrity Understanding of software architecture, backend best practices, and scalable system design Ability to troubleshoot, debug, and improve existing systems Experience writing clean, maintainable, and testable code Comfortable taking ownership of features from planning to deployment Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail Experience with SEO-focused backend development is a strong plus What we expect Develop and maintain backend services and APIs Design and implement scalable backend solutions for new products and features Manage Django models, migrations, and database structures Optimize PostgreSQL performance and data workflows Improve system reliability, maintainability, and performance Collaborate closely with product, mobile, growth, and SEO teams Own backend initiatives from planning to deployment Build systems that support SEO, content scalability, and organic growth Develop infrastructure for sitemaps, structured data, and search engine discoverability Contribute to technical decisions and architecture discussions Tech stack Python Django Django REST Framework PostgreSQL Redis Git If you’re passionate about mobile, AI, and building products that scale — we should talk. We love shipping real things that make a difference and we’re building with people who do too. Think you can keep up? Drop us a line: jobs@lokalde.com Thanks for your interest, we truly appreciate the effort you put into applying.
